## Description
<!-- Describe your changes -->

## Type of Change
- [ ] `feat` - New feature
- [ ] `fix` - Bug fix
- [ ] `docs` - Documentation
- [ ] `style` - Formatting
- [ ] `refactor` - Code refactor
- [ ] `perf` - Performance
- [ ] `test` - Tests
- [ ] `chore` - Build/tooling

## Checklist
- [ ] Build passes (`pnpm build`)
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated (if applicable)
- [ ] No breaking changes (or documented)
